productName: Kelso Kandy - KK TERP+INF PR .8g (Single) - Blood Orange - .8g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Blood Orange flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of apricot, orange, and citrus, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
